title: stevia dubia
intro: Stevia dubia is a plant species in the sunflower family, scientifically known as Stevia rebaudiana var. dubia, that is native to Paraguay and is known for its sweet-tasting leaves. The medicinal properties of Stevia dubia include its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and its potential anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stevia dubia include its potential to help regulate blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural digestive aid. Stevia dubia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a sweetener in its dried leaf form.
